notes: Baseline reads expanded FP8/FP16 payload weights in the same scalar dot kernel.
Fused path reads packed codebook-index, loads a payload from a normal global-memory LUT, and immediately consumes it in the same dot kernel.
LUT relies on hardware caches; no explicit register/shared-memory LUT placement is used.
This is closer than a standalone decode benchmark, but still not an MFMA/Tensor-core production GEMM benchmark.
